answer:
The generating function for the $k$-combinations of $\{a_{1}, a_{2}, \cdots, a_{n}\}$ is $\frac{n!}{k!(n-k)!}$.

The generating function for the $k$-combinations of $\{\infty \cdot a_{1}, \infty \cdot a_{2}, \cdots, \infty \cdot a_{n}\}$ is $a^k$.

The generating function for the 10-combinations of $\{3 \cdot a, 4 \cdot b, 5 \cdot c\}$ is $\frac{a^{10}b^{10}c^{10}}{3^{10}4^{10}5^{10}}$.

\boxed{\frac{a^{10}b^{10}c^{10}}{3^{10}4^{10}5^{10}}}
